page: Amazon Web Services c8in.24xlarge is a compute-optimized, network-optimized eighth-generation server instance. It is powered by dedicated Intel x86_64 processors running at a clock speed of 3.9 GHz. The instance features 96 virtual CPUs mapped to 48 physical cores with 2.0 threads per core, managed by the AWS Nitro hypervisor.

The instance is equipped with 192.0 GB of system memory, yielding a memory-to-vCPU ratio of 2.0 GB per vCPU. It does not include local instance storage, meaning all storage requirements must be met via external network-attached block storage. There are no GPU accelerators present on this server type.

A key feature of the c8in.24xlarge is its high-capacity networking, delivering a baseline network bandwidth of 150 Gbps. This high network throughput, combined with dedicated high-frequency Intel compute resources, makes this instance suitable for network-intensive and compute-heavy workloads. Appropriate use cases include high-performance computing, network appliances, distributed analytics, and compute-intensive batch processing.
description: Amazon Web Services c8in.24xlarge is an eighth-generation, compute-optimized server instance designed for high-performance and network-intensive workloads. Powered by the AWS Nitro hypervisor, it features 96 dedicated x86_64 vCPUs from Intel running at 3.9 GHz, paired with 192.0 GB of system memory. This configuration provides a compute-focused resource density of 2.0 GB of RAM per vCPU. The instance does not include local storage or GPUs, relying entirely on network-attached storage. However, it delivers a high baseline network bandwidth of 150 Gbps. This hardware profile makes the c8in.24xlarge highly efficient for workloads requiring significant CPU processing power and high network throughput, such as network appliances, distributed analytics, and compute-intensive batch processing.
og_description: Amazon Web Services c8in.24xlarge is a compute-optimized server featuring 96 Intel vCPUs at 3.9 GHz, 192.0 GB of RAM, and 150 Gbps baseline network bandwidth, running on the Nitro hypervisor.

tagline: A high-frequency compute-optimized instance featuring ninety-six dedicated virtual CPUs and high-capacity one-hundred-and-fifty gigabit baseline networking.
